props.variant: Visual style — elevated, flat, tonal, outlined, text, plain, gradient, relief, line, floating, or shadow.
props.color: A theme color name (primary, success…) or any CSS color.
props.size: x-small, small, default, large, or x-large.
props.icon: Renders a compact, icon-only button when set to an icon value.
props.circle: Makes an icon button fully circular.
props.loading: Shows the dual-ring loader overlay and blocks interaction.
props.upload: Shows an upload progress sweep overlay.
props.active: Forces the active/pressed look (e.g. a selected toggle).
props.block: Stretches the button to the full container width.
props.animationType: Reveals the `animate` slot on hover — horizontal, vertical, scale, or rotate.
props.href: Renders the button as an <a> link.

events.click: Emitted on click when the button is not disabled or loading.

slots.animate: Content revealed on hover when `animation-type` is set.
